title: Ultimate Warden
description: A datapack/mod that enhances the Warden with a custom Dungeon, a boss battle, and more.
body:
# **Ultimate Warden**
### [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1403752313289576541?label=Discord&logo=Discord)](https://discord.com/invite/pPZFaeYxu8)   [![Bug Reports](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Eli55555/UltimateWarden-DP?label=Bug%20Reports&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Eli55555/UltimateWarden-DP/issues)

Ultimate Warden improves the vanilla Warden by adding a custom dungeon, bossbars and custom loot drops to the warden.

# **⚙️Features**
<details> <summary>Custom Loot Drops</summary>
  
- Sculk Shrieker
- Warden Shrieker – A Sculk Shrieker that can summon a Warden
- Golden Apple
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Netherite Scrap
- Silence Armor Trim
- Dungeon Key - Hold it for 30 secons to enter the Warden Dungeon

</details>
<details>
<summary>Bossbar</summary>
  
Adds a bossbar to the Warden. It becomes visible when you're within 22 blocks.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Dungeon</summary>
A completely new dungeon with custom loot and more. Some Warden Tools are hidden throughout the dungeon. At the end, you will face the Ultimate Warden in an intense boss fight, featuring custom attacks and unique loot drops.
Defeating him rewards you with a special key that you must hold for 10 seconds to leave the dungeon...


</details>
